page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Accurate and rapid RiboRNA sequences Detector based on deep learning
page_metadata.biotools__summary: RiboDetector is a software developed to accurately yet rapidly detect and remove rRNA sequences from metagenomeic, metatranscriptomic, and ncRNA sequencing data. It was developed based on LSTMs and optimized for both GPU and CPU.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RiboDetector is a software developed to accurately yet rapidly detect and remove rRNA sequences from metagenomeic, metatranscriptomic, and ncRNA sequencing data. It was developed based on LSTMs and optimized for both GPU and CPU.
